column1: # DSGV Hub Firmware — Partition Table (4 MB flash)
# Layout: dual-bank OTA + isolated Matter NVS
# │ nvs         │  24 KB   │ App config
# │ otadata     │   8 KB   │ Bootloader OTA state (which bank is active)     │
# │ phy_init    │   4 KB   │ RF / PHY calibration data                       │
# │ ota_0       │  1.8 MB  │ Active firmware (production slot)               │
# │ ota_1       │  1.8 MB  │ OTA update slot (bootloader rolls back on crash)│
# │ matter_nvs  │ 256 KB   │ Matter pairing & fabric data (ISOLATED)         │
# matter_nvs is a separate NVS partition so that a Matter factory-reset
# (decommission from HomeKit / Google Home / Alexa) erases ONLY Matter pairing
# data — it does NOT touch Wi-Fi credentials or device config in the main nvs
# partition. Set CONFIG_CHIP_NVS_PARTITION_NAME="matter_nvs" to activate this.
# OTA slot headroom: 1
# Hard build limit enforced by scripts/check_binary_size.py.
# For 8 MB flash (recommended for new hardware spins): use partitions_8mb.csv
# Name
nvs
otadata
phy_init
ota_0
ota_1
matter_nvs
